text.title: Change Request Impact Rubric — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is traceability data current AND can a bin be computed?

conclusion.verdict: escalate to PO or steering per policy

example.trace: CR-101 → traceability current → 12 stories touched → bin=M → PO approval
